meta.title: i18n AI Generator | Smart JSON Localization
meta.description: Professional localization in seconds. Convert raw text to structured i18n JSON with AI.

editor.placeholder: Paste your text here... (e.g., Save: Сохранить)
editor.limitNote: * Optimized for up to 30 keys per generation
editor.tip: Enable 'Nested Structure' for texts with sections.
editor.tooMuchData: Too much data. Please limit your text to 30 items.

result.label: Resulting Locales
result.footerNote: Professional i18n structure provided by AI

tutorial.title: How to use the tool?
tutorial.step1: Paste your text (up to 30 lines) into the left field.
tutorial.step2: The AI ​​will automatically detect the source language.
tutorial.step3: Select a Key Style: for example, camelCase for JS/TS or snake_case for Python/Ruby.
tutorial.step4: Use Nested Structure if you want to group keys into semantic blocks separated by dots.
tutorial.step5: Copy the result or download the prepared ZIP archive with two JSON files.

guide.title: An intelligent tool for developers that automates the routine process of creating localization files. The application takes raw text in any language and transforms it into structured JSON files with semantically correct keys in English.

smart.title: Smart Detection
smart.desc: Automatically detects input language and prepares structure for English localization.

keys.title: Professional Keys
keys.desc: Generates semantic English keys that are easy to use in code instead of random IDs.

dev.title: Ready for Dev
dev.desc: Output data fully complies with i18n format. Just download ZIP and move files to project.
